context: Verify that the agent identifies the work type, loads the evaluation framework reference, evaluates all core dimensions, and produces a structured report with scores and actionable feedback.

checklist.name: Work type identified before selecting dimensions
checklist.description: The agent explicitly identifies this as an empirical research paper and selects the appropriate evaluation dimensions before beginning assessment.

checklist.name: references/evaluation_framework.md loaded
checklist.description: The agent references or loads evaluation_framework.md before scoring any dimension.

checklist.name: All core dimensions addressed
checklist.description: The agent evaluates at least Problem Formulation, Methodology, Data Quality, Analysis Rigor, and Writing Quality.

checklist.name: Scores provided with supporting evidence
checklist.description: Each dimension score is accompanied by specific evidence from the work, not generic statements.

checklist.name: Actionable recommendations provided
checklist.description: The report includes at least 2 prioritised, specific recommendations for improvement.
